info.english_meaning: to go to kill to see
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: IzatItIza uYCerTe gatyAdAvIzate Bavet ' (Slo. 169) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'paSavo vE samIzantI' (vizwutiH) (paYca0 brA0 3124) samityekoBAve ekIBUya Izati gacCati saNgamanItyarTaH
'eza vAmanaH samIzitaH paSuBya eva prajAteByaH pratizWAM daDAti' (tE0 saM0 2152) samIzitaH samyag Izito gamitaH
'daDnaH somya maTyamAnasya yo'RimA sa UrDvaH samudIzati tatsarpirBavati' (CAM0 u0 661) samudIzati=udgacCati
